title: GCS bucket 'acme-public' has allUsers as roles/storage.objectViewer
description: GCS bucket acme-public has an IAM binding granting "roles/storage.objectViewer" to "allUsers", making the bucket publicly accessible. Remove this binding to restrict access and prevent unauthorized data exposure.

title: GCS bucket 'acme-public' does not use uniform bucket-level access
description: GCS bucket acme-public does not have uniform bucket-level access enabled. Without uniform access, ACLs and IAM policies can create inconsistent permissions. Enable uniform bucket-level access for simpler, more secure permission management.

title: GCS bucket 'acme-assets' uses Google-managed encryption (CMEK recommended)
description: GCS bucket acme-assets does not have a customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) configured. While Google-managed encryption is applied by default, CMEK provides additional control over encryption key lifecycle, access, and auditability.

title: GCS bucket 'acme-backups' has allAuthenticatedUsers as roles/storage.admin
description: GCS bucket acme-backups has an IAM binding granting "roles/storage.admin" to "allAuthenticatedUsers", making the bucket publicly accessible. Remove this binding to restrict access and prevent unauthorized data exposure.

title: GCS bucket 'acme-backups' does not use uniform bucket-level access
description: GCS bucket acme-backups does not have uniform bucket-level access enabled. Without uniform access, ACLs and IAM policies can create inconsistent permissions. Enable uniform bucket-level access for simpler, more secure permission management.

title: GCS bucket 'acme-ml-data' does not use uniform bucket-level access
description: GCS bucket acme-ml-data does not have uniform bucket-level access enabled. Without uniform access, ACLs and IAM policies can create inconsistent permissions. Enable uniform bucket-level access for simpler, more secure permission management.

title: BigQuery dataset 'analytics' uses Google-managed encryption (CMEK recommended)
description: BigQuery dataset analytics in project acme-bank-data uses Google-managed encryption instead of customer-managed keys (CMEK). CMEK enables key management control, access revocation, and compliance with data residency requirements.

title: BigQuery dataset 'analytics' has public access via IAM
description: BigQuery dataset analytics has an IAM binding granting "roles/bigquery.dataViewer" to "allAuthenticatedUsers". Public access to analytical datasets exposes sensitive business data. Remove the public IAM binding immediately.

title: BigQuery dataset 'analytics' has no default table expiration policy
description: BigQuery dataset analytics does not have a default table expiration policy. Without table expiration, data may be retained indefinitely. Configure a default table expiration appropriate for the data classification.

title: BigQuery dataset 'reporting' uses Google-managed encryption (CMEK recommended)
description: BigQuery dataset reporting in project acme-bank-data uses Google-managed encryption instead of customer-managed keys (CMEK). CMEK enables key management control, access revocation, and compliance with data residency requirements.

title: BigQuery dataset 'reporting' has no default table expiration policy
description: BigQuery dataset reporting does not have a default table expiration policy. Without table expiration, data may be retained indefinitely. Configure a default table expiration appropriate for the data classification.

title: Cloud SQL 'prod-db' has public IP enabled
description: Cloud SQL instance prod-db is accessible via a public IP address. This increases the attack surface. Use private IP (Cloud SQL Private Service Connect or VPC peering) to restrict access to authorized networks.

title: Cloud SQL 'prod-db' authorized network allows 0.0.0.0/0
description: Cloud SQL instance prod-db has authorized network rule "allow-all" that allows connections from any IP (0.0.0.0/0). Remove this overly permissive rule and restrict access to specific IP ranges or use Cloud SQL Auth Proxy.

title: Cloud SQL 'prod-db' does not require SSL for client connections
description: Cloud SQL instance prod-db does not require SSL/TLS for client connections. Unencrypted database connections are vulnerable to eavesdropping and man-in-the-middle attacks. Enable SSL enforcement on the instance.

title: Cloud SQL 'analytics-db' has public IP enabled
description: Cloud SQL instance analytics-db is accessible via a public IP address. This increases the attack surface. Use private IP (Cloud SQL Private Service Connect or VPC peering) to restrict access to authorized networks.

title: Cloud SQL 'analytics-db' does not require SSL for client connections
description: Cloud SQL instance analytics-db does not require SSL/TLS for client connections. Unencrypted database connections are vulnerable to eavesdropping and man-in-the-middle attacks. Enable SSL enforcement on the instance.

title: Cloud SQL 'analytics-db' does not have automated backups enabled
description: Cloud SQL instance analytics-db does not have automated backups enabled. Without automated backups, there is no point-in-time recovery capability for the database. Enable automated backups to protect against data loss.

title: GKE cluster 'gke-prod' lacks Workload Identity
description: GKE cluster gke-prod does not have Workload Identity enabled. Without Workload Identity, pods must use node service account credentials or mounted key files to access GCP services, violating least-privilege. Enable Workload Identity to bind Kubernetes service accounts to GCP IAM service accounts.

title: GKE cluster 'gke-prod' does not use shielded nodes
description: GKE cluster gke-prod does not have shielded GKE nodes enabled. Shielded nodes provide verifiable node integrity using Secure Boot, vTPM, and Integrity Monitoring. Enable shielded nodes to protect against rootkits and bootloader attacks.

title: GKE cluster 'gke-prod' is not configured as a private cluster
description: GKE cluster gke-prod nodes have public IP addresses, exposing them to the internet. A private cluster restricts node IP addresses to RFC 1918 ranges, reducing the attack surface. Migrate to a private cluster configuration.

title: GKE cluster 'gke-prod' does not enforce Kubernetes NetworkPolicy
description: GKE cluster gke-prod does not have network policy enforcement enabled. Without network policies, pods can communicate with all other pods in the cluster. Enable NetworkPolicy support to restrict pod-to-pod traffic.

title: GKE cluster 'gke-prod' does not restrict master authorized networks
description: GKE cluster gke-prod does not have master authorized networks configured. Without this, the Kubernetes API server is accessible from any IP address. Configure authorized networks to restrict API server access to trusted IP ranges.

title: IAM binding grants primitive role 'roles/owner' to 3 member(s) in 'acme-bank-prod'
description: GCP project acme-bank-prod assigns the primitive role "roles/owner" to 3 member(s): user:alice@acmebank.com, user:bob@acmebank.com, user:sysadmin@acmebank.com. Primitive roles grant overly broad permissions across all GCP services. Replace with predefined or custom roles following least-privilege.

title: IAM binding grants primitive role 'roles/editor' to 2 member(s) in 'acme-bank-prod'
description: GCP project acme-bank-prod assigns the primitive role "roles/editor" to 2 member(s): user:carol@acmebank.com, user:devops@acmebank.com. Primitive roles grant overly broad permissions across all GCP services. Replace with predefined or custom roles following least-privilege.

title: IAM binding grants primitive role 'roles/owner' to 1 member(s) in 'acme-bank-data'
description: GCP project acme-bank-data assigns the primitive role "roles/owner" to 1 member(s): user:dataeng@acmebank.com. Primitive roles grant overly broad permissions across all GCP services. Replace with predefined or custom roles following least-privilege.

title: IAM binding grants primitive role 'roles/editor' to 2 member(s) in 'acme-bank-data'
description: GCP project acme-bank-data assigns the primitive role "roles/editor" to 2 member(s): user:analyst@acmebank.com, user:ml-engineer@acmebank.com. Primitive roles grant overly broad permissions across all GCP services. Replace with predefined or custom roles following least-privilege.

title: IAM binding grants primitive role 'roles/owner' to 1 member(s) in 'acme-bank-dev'
description: GCP project acme-bank-dev assigns the primitive role "roles/owner" to 1 member(s): user:dev-lead@acmebank.com. Primitive roles grant overly broad permissions across all GCP services. Replace with predefined or custom roles following least-privilege.

title: Admin service account 'sa-deployer@acme-bank-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com' has user-managed keys
description: Service account sa-deployer@acme-bank-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com has an admin-level role and 1 user-managed key(s). Admin service accounts with downloadable keys pose a critical security risk if the key is leaked. Use Workload Identity or short-lived tokens instead.

title: Service account key for 'sa-dataproc@acme-bank-data.iam.gserviceaccount.com' not rotated in 90+ days
description: Service account sa-dataproc@acme-bank-data.iam.gserviceaccount.com has a user-managed key created on 2024-11-01T00:00:00Z that has not been rotated in over 90 days. Rotate service account keys regularly to reduce the risk of compromised credentials.

title: KMS key 'app-key' does not have automatic rotation configured
description: GCP KMS crypto key projects/acme-bank-prod/locations/us-east1/keyRings/acme-kr/cryptoKeys/app-key does not have an automatic rotation period configured. Configure automatic key rotation to limit the amount of data encrypted under a single key version and reduce the blast radius of key compromise.

title: KMS key 'logs-key' does not have automatic rotation configured
description: GCP KMS crypto key projects/acme-bank-prod/locations/us-east1/keyRings/acme-kr/cryptoKeys/logs-key does not have an automatic rotation period configured. Configure automatic key rotation to limit the amount of data encrypted under a single key version and reduce the blast radius of key compromise.

title: KMS key 'logs-key' is publicly accessible via IAM
description: GCP KMS crypto key projects/acme-bank-prod/locations/us-east1/keyRings/acme-kr/cryptoKeys/logs-key has an IAM binding granting "roles/cloudkms.cryptoKeyEncrypterDecrypter" to "allUsers". Public access to encryption keys is a critical security risk. Remove public access immediately.

title: KMS key 'ml-key' does not have automatic rotation configured
description: GCP KMS crypto key projects/acme-bank-data/locations/us-central1/keyRings/data-kr/cryptoKeys/ml-key does not have an automatic rotation period configured. Configure automatic key rotation to limit the amount of data encrypted under a single key version and reduce the blast radius of key compromise.

title: SCC: OPEN FIREWALL — default-allow-ssh
description: Security Command Center active finding: Firewall rule allows SSH from 0.0.0.0/0 (finding ID: f002)

title: SCC: OPEN FIREWALL — default-allow-rdp
description: Security Command Center active finding: Firewall rule allows RDP from 0.0.0.0/0 (finding ID: f003)

title: SCC: SQL NO ROOT PASSWORD — prod-db
description: Security Command Center active finding: Cloud SQL instance has no root password set (finding ID: f004)

title: SCC: AUDIT LOGGING DISABLED — acme-bank-dev
description: Security Command Center active finding: Cloud Audit Logs data access logging is disabled (finding ID: f005)

title: SCC: MFA NOT ENFORCED — 123456789
description: Security Command Center active finding: Organization policy does not enforce MFA for users (finding ID: f006)
